food.title: Explore food
food.sub: Every dish tagged with your risk.

reviewReminder.title: Review reminder
reviewReminder.body: Did you try Kimchi Stew? Leave a review.

catalogUpdated.title: Catalog updated
catalogUpdated.body: Jokbal now has curated ingredient data.

welcome.title: Welcome to K-Bap
welcome.body: Scan your first menu to get started.

community.lockedBody: The tab is reserved in the MVP. Boards, comments and per-nationality feeds arrive in phase 2.

scan.hint: Point at a menu and tap to scan
scan.permissionBody: K-Bap needs your camera to scan menus on the spot.
scan.noText: No menu text found. Move closer and try again.
scan.failed: Scan failed. Check your connection and try again.
scan.errCapture: Couldn't capture the photo. Try again.
scan.errOcr: Couldn't read text from the photo (OCR). See Metro logs.
scan.errNetwork: Can't reach the scan service. Check your connection.
scan.errBe: The scan service returned an error. See Metro logs.
scan.spikeNote: Spike: risk comes live from the backend (currently a mock).

owner.caption: Show this screen to the restaurant staff

review.title: Write a review
review.placeholder: Share what it tasted like, and any tips for travelers with your restrictions…
review.postedBody: Thanks! Your {{rating}}-star review of {{name}} is now in the food's reviews and counts toward your ranking.

detail.insideSub: Risk-ordered for your profile · tap any item for details
detail.disclaimer: Risk labels are guidance, not medical advice. Confirm with the owner.
detail.unableBody: This dish isn't in our curated catalog yet, so safety can't be verified. Don't assume it's safe — ask the owner.
detail.noIngredientBody: No rating, description, or ingredient data yet. We've logged this dish to improve the catalog.

states.emptyReviewsBody: Be the first to review this dish — your note helps the next traveler eat with confidence.
states.errorBody: We couldn't load this right now. It's on our side, not yours.
states.offlineBody: Connect to the internet to scan menus and load reviews. Your saved scans are still here.
states.unableBody: We don't have enough ingredient data to rate this dish for your profile. Ask the owner before eating.

shell.placeholderNote: Tab content lives in the screen modules

home.greetingSub: Here's what's safe for you today.
home.greetingSubEmpty: Let's find your first safe dish.
home.scanSub: Point at a Korean menu to see your risk.
home.safeSub: Dishes that clear all your restrictions
home.recentSub: Tap to revisit · leave a review
home.disclaimer: Risk reflects your profile and is guidance only — always confirm with the owner.
home.emptyBody: Scan your first Korean menu to see what's safe for you.
home.popularSub: Already tagged with your risk profile

onboarding.welcomeTag: Know what's safe to eat — before you order.
onboarding.terms: By continuing you agree to the Terms & Privacy Policy.
onboarding.verifySub: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it to confirm it's you.
onboarding.profileSub: Required — your nationality powers same-nationality reviews; your language sets every translation.
onboarding.restrictionsSub: Optional — but this powers every safety warning. Add what you can, change it anytime.
onboarding.restrictionsNotice: Skip now and dishes show without personal risk until you add restrictions.
onboarding.spiceSub: Optional — change it anytime. Every dish shows heat on this same 0–10 scale.
onboarding.interestsSub: Optional — pick a few favorites to personalize recommendations.
onboarding.consentGuidance: Risk labels are guidance, not medical advice.
onboarding.consentVary: Ingredients vary by restaurant — always confirm 'Caution' items with the owner.
onboarding.consentYours: The final choice of what you eat is yours.
onboarding.consentAgree: I understand and agree to the safety notice.
onboarding.consentNote: Consent recorded once · re-shown on every risk screen
